title: C1 listening response
subtitle: Turn listening into active analysis.
overview: After listening, reconstruct the speaker’s argument and evaluate it.

Module: C1 Med Integration. C1 Med develops sustained independent argument, sophisticated source synthesis, editorial revision, professional authority, complex social reasoning, and controlled advanced output.

sections.title: C1 Med focus
rows: After listening, reconstruct the speaker’s argument and evaluate it.
听完后重建说话者论证并评价。
I need to turn skill into habit, and habit into flexible performance.
我需要把技能变成习惯，再把习惯变成灵活表现。
Listen to a talk and identify the strongest and weakest point.
听一个讲话，找出最强和最弱的一点。
The speaker’s strongest point is the link between incentives and behavior, but the weakest point is the lack of evidence about long-term effects.
说话者最强的一点是激励和行为之间的联系，但最弱的一点是缺少长期影响证据。

items.en: After listening, reconstruct the speaker’s argument and evaluate it.
items.zh: 听完后重建说话者论证并评价。

items.en: I need to turn skill into habit, and habit into flexible performance.
items.zh: 我需要把技能变成习惯，再把习惯变成灵活表现。

items.en: The speaker’s strongest point is the link between incentives and behavior, but the weakest point is the lack of evidence about long-term effects.
items.zh: 说话者最强的一点是激励和行为之间的联系，但最弱的一点是缺少长期影响证据。

items.en: I will make the reasoning explicit instead of relying on impressive vocabulary.
items.zh: 我会把推理说清楚，而不是依赖华丽词汇。

items.en: A C1 Med answer should sustain a line of thought across several connected moves.
items.zh: C1 Med 回答应该能通过几个相连动作维持一条思路。

items.en: If the idea becomes dense, I will slow down and give the listener a clear route.
items.zh: 如果想法变得密集，我会放慢，并给听者一条清楚路线。

items.en: I can revise for argument, evidence, rhythm, and voice.
items.zh: 我可以从论证、证据、节奏和个人声音上修改。

items.en: This lesson is finished only when I can use the move in an unfamiliar topic.
items.zh: 只有当我能在陌生话题中使用这个动作时，这节课才算完成。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Listen to a talk and identify the strongest and weakest point.
lines.zh: 听一个讲话，找出最强和最弱的一点。

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: The speaker’s strongest point is the link between incentives and behavior, but the weakest point is the lack of evidence about long-term effects.
lines.zh: 说话者最强的一点是激励和行为之间的联系，但最弱的一点是缺少长期影响证据。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Can you make the argument more sustained and more independent?
lines.zh: 你能让这个论证更持续、更独立吗？

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: Yes. I will connect the claim, evidence, limitation, and implication without losing the thread.
lines.zh: 可以。我会把观点、证据、局限和影响连起来，同时不丢主线。

items.en: Listen to a talk and identify the strongest and weakest point.
items.zh: 听一个讲话，找出最强和最弱的一点。

items.en: Answer once in ten to twelve sentences with a sustained line of thought.
items.zh: 用十到十二个句子回答一次，保持一条持续的思路。

items.en: Add one C1 Med move: evaluate evidence, compare assumptions, refine a concept, or revise the tone.
items.zh: 加入一个 C1 Med 动作：评价证据、比较假设、细化概念或调整语气。

items.en: Record the answer, then rewrite one section for clarity and one section for style.
items.zh: 录下回答，然后为清晰度重写一部分，为风格重写一部分。

items.en: Keep the final version as a model for C1 Hi practice.
items.zh: 把最终版本保留下来，作为 C1 Hi 练习的模板。
